message: Jake
Cindy
Tim
Ah, welcome.
Hey, it's been a while. How have you been?
As you can see, nothing has really changed.
Welcome, you come by often today.
Look
Talk

Since it’s still early, there are no other customers in Inside the Bar besides me. There’s not even a band on stage, making the nighttime hustle feel like a lie.
Still, does anyone even come to the bar this early? It feels kind of pointless.
In the dimly lit bar, it feels like my sense of time might become numb. I spend dozens of hours here every week.
I wonder if my body is okay with that?
An empty bar evokes a rather sad atmosphere, reminiscent of the scene after closing, signaling the end of the night.
He's just a young man aspiring to be a musician, like so many others. He has no future prospects or financial security.
But he has the advantage of youth. That's something you can’t really buy.
It's not like there's no hope at all, though.
Many young people across America, or even around the world, wish to have a steady partner.
He’s a lucky guy who has won the heart of one.
In my eyes,
I can't believe they have any special talent.
Chasing dreams is fine, but I hope you'll start facing reality soon.
Is today a customer? Or a friend?
Yeah.
It's like I came to talk.
I'm glad it's a slow time. It's okay to talk now.
I thought so.
This place isn't one that's open at this hour anyway.
I've been pretty busy lately. I've taken a break from my part-time job, and it's hit me hard financially.
I can manage a bit.
It's fine. I can figure it out myself.
I've been thinking I need to work harder, too.
By the way, how did the audition go?
It's obvious I failed.
Oh, you really didn't make it?
It's fine. You don't have to put on a gloomy face. If I had passed, it would have been a problem for me.
Wasn't it makeup and cross-dressing?
Yeah. You think that's a world I could handle?
Before the audition, I had some small hopes, but nah, there are plenty of people like me out there.
Shinde.
Ariana, who wasn't.
Was complaining that they wouldn't hang out with them.
It’s okay, sometimes I need to give them time to think.
Time to think?
Yeah. Time to miss the world as it was.
After all, it would be reckless to live just the two of us. It's 180 degrees different from the life I had before. There's no way I could make it.
Is that okay with you?
Yeah. I like them, so even if they become distant, I want them to shine, right?
Speaking of which, I heard you decided to meet your mom.
Yeah, she agreed.
Ariana.
She isn't the kind of scheming parent to take advantage of that, right?
It's fine. Her professional status is quite impressive.
Is she a company executive or something?
Uh.
Well, how should I put this?
I guess it's called self-employed.
I don’t really get it.
Anyway, don’t do anything that would make Ariana sad.
Ariana should be home, so go hang out with her. She’s starving for conversation.
Yeah, I’ll do that.
Thanks.
As long as she's happy, that’s all that matters to me.
The master here is strange. He opens the shop all day just because he likes it.
I admit, it is rare.
I think it's beyond rare—it's just plain weird.
The master is the guy behind the counter, but he acts young while being 40.
Huh?
I've been called ‘old man’ by him before.
What a guy.
During the day, I’ll chat with you.
He seems to care about her, but still,
I don’t really like him.
If it’s called jealousy, then so be it,
but I can't see a man worth making her throw everything away for.
The fact that he doesn’t treat me poorly is probably a sign that I've been recognized as a good confidant to him,
right?
Considering she failed the audition, she doesn’t seem that down.
After all,
perhaps there's something off about her introduction. Maybe she's rather relieved?
She hasn’t told that her real mother is Meryl yet.
If she said that, it might change her feelings.
If she finds out her mother, who abandoned her, is actually a big actress, living a wonderful life with status, fame, and supporters,
with Meryl and...
Imagining a scene of a parent and child meeting makes me feel really down.
They must be at home right now,
waiting for their return. But,
for them,
it must be hard to return.
Well then,
see you later.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
